full_loop.title: Run a complete Nuclear → Generator → Electric Motor loop powering your Create network

nuke_shell.title: Craft a Nuclear Shell (Create Nuclear Shell mod — requires uranium and steel barrel)

subtitle.text: The factory runs on something that used to be a star. Both kinds.

description: A complete nuclear power loop means the factory is energy-independent.
No fuel trains. No Blaze Burner refills.
The reactor runs. The generator converts. The motors drive.
Create Nuclear Shell (Cannon Nukes mod) adds the nuclear shell.
It requires uranium ore, steel barrel, and precise crafting.
It is not subtle. It is also not necessary for game completion.
It is available. The choice is yours.
The steel reactor (Create Nuclear Shell) is an alternate heat source
for the boiler chain — less dangerous than nuclear material handling.
→ Run a complete nuclear → electrical → rotational loop [check]
→ Craft a Nuclear Shell if you choose to [check]
